title: Jiggly Pets Brown Puppy Interactive Electronic Puppy toy with sounds music and movement Animal Toys Interactive pets Walking toy puppy
features: Jiggly Pets Puppy is the cutest walking dog!
Simply press the head to bring your Jiggly Pup to life
This electronic brown puppy walks, barks and wags their tail whilst playing a catchy tune!
This adorable pup is soft to touch with stretchy rubbery face and body.
Take your pup friend with you wherever you go!
description: From the manufacturer THE CUTEST WAKING PUP! Jiggly Pets Puppy is the cutest, funkiest walking dog! Simply press the head to bring Jiggly Pup to life. This electronic puppy walks, barks and wags their tail whilst playing a catchy tune! This adorable pup is so soft to touch with stretchy rubbery face and body. It’s the cutest, funniest pup – you’ll have so much fun as you watch your pup walk and jiggle to the music SO MUCH FUN WITH JIGGLY PUP! WALKS, BARKS AND WAGS! This electronic puppy walks, barks and wags their tail whilst playing a catchy tune! Watch pup move to the rhythm of the music! You’ll have so much fun as you watch your pup walk and jiggle to the music! No dog dances more adorably than Jiggly Pup. Listening to the catchy tune is sure to make you want to dance too! SO SOFT! This adorable pup is so soft to touch with stretchy rubbery face and body. You wont be able to stop stroking your new pup friend! YOUR NEW BEST FRIEND! Jiggly Pets Pup is sure to become your best friend. Take your pup friend with you wherever you go!
